app.name: Watson
app.tagline: Keeps your work together and shows what matters.

availability.title: Availability and do not disturb
availability.loadFailed: Availability couldn't be loaded. Your existing settings were not changed.
availability.invalidTimezone: Enter a valid IANA timezone, for example Europe/Prague.
availability.saveFailed: The availability change couldn't be saved. Reload the current state and try again.
availability.snoozeStopped: Do not disturb is off. {{count}} reminders returned to the queue.
availability.quickDesc: Choose a duration. Watson will not mute evenings or weekends unless you configure it.
availability.quickActiveDesc: Manual do not disturb keeps reminders queued until you stop it or it expires.
availability.quickScheduledDesc: A scheduled block or quiet hours currently controls availability. Edit it in Settings.
availability.snoozeActiveDesc: Push reminders are safely held {{until}}. Teammates can see that you are unavailable.
availability.snoozeReadyDesc: Pauses push reminders without deleting anything. They return to the queue when you stop it.
availability.scheduleTitle: Working hours, timezone and quiet hours
availability.workingHoursDesc: Informational and used for planning; it does not prohibit evening or weekend work by itself.
availability.quietHoursDesc: Enable only times when you really do not want alerts. Overnight periods and daylight-saving changes use your timezone.
availability.blocksDesc: These are not tasks. They form a separate calendar layer and scheduling into Focus Time requires an emergency exception.
availability.noBlocks: You have no upcoming blocks. Blocks do not replace your working-hours schedule.
availability.blockCancelled: The block was cancelled and held reminders will be evaluated again.
availability.cancelBlockConfirm: Cancel this availability block? Its history remains in the audit log.
availability.invalidBlockTime: The start and end are invalid, or the end is not after the start.
availability.focusEmergencyNote: Focus Time is a hard scheduling block. An emergency exception requires explicit confirmation and an audited reason.
availability.label: Short label
availability.labelPlaceholder: For example deep work or vacation
availability.privateBlock: Hide the label from teammates (type and time remain visible)
availability.teamAvailable: No one currently has do not disturb or an active block.

dependencies.strictBlocked: The task cannot be completed: it is still blocked by {{names}} ({{count}} total).
dependencies.warningBlocked: The task is still blocked by {{names}} ({{count}} total). Click again within 10 seconds to continue anyway.

savedViews.title: Saved views
savedViews.empty: You have no saved views yet.
savedViews.nameConflict: A view with this name already exists
savedViews.stale: Someone changed this view. Load its newer version first.
savedViews.teamForbidden: Only workspace leadership can manage team views
savedViews.invalid: This view has an invalid or outdated configuration

shell.lockView: Lock this view as default for all sections

quickadd.placeholder: Add task… (e.g. call Petra tomorrow at 3pm p1 #Sales)
quickadd.saveFailed: Task wasn't saved to this device. Your text is intact — try again.

sync.writeRejected: The server rejected this change and it was reverted. See Settings → Sync problems for details.
sync.bannerOffline: You're offline. Showing saved data from {{time}}; new changes stay on this device and will be sent after reconnecting.
sync.bannerConnecting: Reconnecting. Until then, showing saved data from {{time}}.
sync.bannerError: Sync failed. The displayed data is from {{time}}, and new changes may not be on the server yet.
sync.bannerProblems_one: The server rejected {{count}} change; it was reverted and needs review.
sync.bannerProblems_other: The server rejected {{count}} changes; they were reverted and need review.
sync.unavailableOfflineDesc: This device doesn't have a confirmed local copy yet. Connect to the internet and try again; an empty screen would not be a reliable state.
sync.unavailableErrorDesc: Watson has no confirmed data it can safely display. Check your connection and try again.
sync.outboxLoadError: The outgoing queue could not be read safely. Local changes remain on this device.
sync.outboxEmpty: All local changes are confirmed by the server and none need attention.
sync.outboxWaitingConnection: Waiting for a connection; data remains safely on this device
sync.outboxWillRetry: Upload failed temporarily; Watson will retry
sync.outboxNoDiff: This operation has no displayable changed fields; the technical detail can still be copied.
sync.outboxMoreFields: Additional fields outside this preview: {{count}}. The sanitized copy contains all of them.
sync.problemsDesc: The server rejected these changes (permissions, conflict, or validation) and they were reverted in the app. Retry after fixing the cause, copy the details, or explicitly discard them.
sync.problemRetryFailed: The change could not be restored ({{code}}).
sync.problemDiscarded: The rejected change was explicitly removed from the problem center.
sync.problemDiscardFailed: The change could not be discarded. It remains safely stored for another review.
sync.problemDiscardConfirm: Permanently discard this unsent change? This action cannot be undone.

detail.actMarkedDecision: marked a comment as a decision
detail.timelineEmpty: There are no events in this view yet.
detail.timelineTaskImported: imported the task from a previous app
detail.timelineAvailabilityOverride: used an emergency exception through Focus Time
detail.timelineIntegrationCreated: created the task from a connected system
detail.whyNowPlaceholder: For example, the client is waiting and other work cannot continue without it…
detail.whyNowEmpty: Add the human context that a date or priority cannot explain.
detail.whyNowSystemSignals: Watson shows these verifiable signals from the task:
detail.subtasksCompleteParentOpen: All subtasks are complete. The parent task remains independently open.
detail.detachedFromParent: The task is now standalone. The change is recorded in history.
detail.blockedCompletionHint: Complete the blocking work first. The workspace policy determines whether you can continue after a warning.
detail.dependencyAddFailed: The dependency could not be added.
detail.dependencyCycle: This link would create a dependency cycle.
detail.dependencyRemoveFailed: The dependency could not be removed.
detail.customFieldOptionsHint: Put each option on its own line. At least two are required.
detail.customFieldsEmpty: This project has no custom fields yet.
detail.customFieldsEmptyEditor: Add a project field for text, number, select, date, status, link, or person.
detail.customFieldSaveFailed: The custom field could not be saved.
detail.customFieldInvalidValue: The value does not match the custom field type.
detail.customFieldIncomplete: Add a name and at least two unique options for a select field.
detail.customFieldNameConflict: A field with this name already exists in the project.
detail.customFieldOptionInUse: An option in use cannot be removed. Change the task values first.
detail.customFieldDeleteConfirm: Click again to permanently remove the field and its values.
detail.customFieldDeleteManagerOnly: Only a project manager can remove a custom field that is in use.
detail.pollsEmpty: This task has no polls yet.
detail.pollsEmptyEditor: Insert a poll for a quick team decision, estimate, text, or date.
detail.pollQuestionPlaceholder: For example, which date works for the team dinner?
detail.pollOptionsPlaceholder:
Tuesday 18:00
Wednesday 19:00
I will not attend
detail.pollOptionsHint: Put each option on its own line. At least two and no more than twenty.
detail.pollIncomplete: Add a question and at least two unique options for a choice poll.
detail.pollClosedHint: Voting is closed. The results remain available in the task history.
detail.pollDeleteConfirm: Click again to permanently remove the poll and all responses.
detail.pollErrorClosed: The poll is closed. The response can no longer be changed.
detail.pollErrorLocked: The question and options cannot be changed after the first response.
detail.pollErrorDeleteRole: Only the poll author or a project manager can remove a poll with responses.
detail.pollErrorConfirm: The delete confirmation no longer matches the current question.
detail.pollErrorResponse: The response does not match the poll type.
detail.pollErrorLimit: A task can contain up to twenty polls.
detail.pollErrorSave: The poll or response could not be saved.
detail.attachmentHint: Up to 10 files at once, 20 MB each. File content is not synced into other users’ devices.
detail.attachmentUploadFailed: The attachment could not be uploaded.
detail.attachmentOffline: Attachments require a connection. You can keep editing the task offline.
detail.attachmentInvalidSize: Empty files and files over 20 MB were skipped.
detail.attachmentDeleteConfirm: Click Delete once more to confirm.
detail.attachmentDeleteFailed: The attachment could not be deleted.
detail.mentionHint: @ mentions a teammate · Enter sends · Shift+Enter adds a line
detail.decisionMarked: The comment is marked as a decision.
detail.acceptanceHelp: Every listed assignee confirms responsibility for this task. The task cannot be completed before acceptance.
detail.acceptanceNotePlaceholder: For example, what needs clarification or the conditions under which you accept…
detail.acceptanceStale: The decision changed in the meantime. Try again after sync.
detail.acceptanceLocked: The decision cannot change after the work is completed.
detail.acceptanceError: The decision could not be saved.
detail.acceptanceCompletionBlocked: The task cannot be completed: {{count}} assignees have not accepted it yet.
detail.assignAnyHint: Completion by one person is enough. The task then closes for everyone.
detail.assignAllHint: Everyone completes their part separately · {{done}} of {{total}} done. The whole task closes after the last person finishes.
detail.remOptionalHint: Optional — add as many as are genuinely useful.
detail.remPast: The reminder must be in the future.
detail.remAddFailed: The reminder could not be added.
detail.remRemoveFailed: The reminder could not be removed.
detail.remPushDenied: Notifications are blocked in the browser — allow them in site settings.
detail.occHint: Completing and skipping applies only to this occurrence; changes to name, priority and people affect the whole series.
detail.hintOverdue: This task is overdue — want to move it to this morning?
detail.hintAll: “Each separately” mode — I track progress per person.
detail.hintAny: It's enough if any of the assignees completes it.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.empty: No projects in this space yet.
projects.presetBlankDesc: A regular list with three simple statuses.
projects.presetTeamPipelineDesc: A board from intake through review to done.
projects.presetDeliveryDesc: A goal project with planning, delivery, and review.
projects.presetRecurringDesc: A periodic project with calendar as its default view.
projects.emptyProject: No tasks in this project yet.
projects.newError: Couldn't create the project. Try again.
projects.newForbidden: You don't have permission to create a project.
projects.newMilestoneHelp: The project starts with an “All tasks complete” condition. You can edit or add conditions later.
projects.milestonesHelp: Progress is derived from tasks. In a goal project, unmet conditions prevent successful closure.
projects.urgentAcceptanceHelp: Only selected high priorities. Regular tasks and work intake forms remain unchanged.
projects.milestoneCondition_completed_count: A set number of tasks are complete
projects.milestonesIncomplete: This goal project cannot be closed until all conditional milestones are met.
projects.settingsStale: The project changed in the meantime. Try again after it syncs.
projects.milestoneStale: The milestone changed in the meantime. Reopen it after syncing.

calendar.recurringDragUnsupported: A single occurrence cannot be moved by dragging yet. Open the task and edit its recurrence rule.
calendar.planningHint: Drag a task into the grid, or move and stretch blocks.
calendar.openDayN: Show all {{n}} tasks on this day
calendar.moreInTime: more tasks at this time — open day
calendar.availabilityStrictBlocked: This time is marked unavailable for {{names}}. Move the task or change the workspace policy.
calendar.availabilityWarning: Heads up: {{names}} have planned unavailability at this time. The task was kept under the workspace warning policy.
calendar.availabilityOffline: Availability cannot be checked right now. The move is saved offline and the server will verify it before sync.
calendar.meetingAvailabilityBlocked: Focus Time or strict unavailability blocks this meeting time for: {{names}}. Choose another time.
calendar.emergencyDesc: Focus Time normally blocks new work. Continue only for something urgent; the exception will be visible in the task history.
calendar.emergencyReason: Why is the emergency exception necessary?
calendar.emergencyReasonPlaceholder: For example, a production incident that cannot wait…
calendar.emergencyAuditNote: The reason, author, task, and exact Focus Time are recorded in the audit trail.
calendar.emergencySaved: The emergency exception was saved and the task was rescheduled.
calendar.emergencyFailed: The exception could not be saved safely. The task was not changed.

today.heading: What to handle today
today.empty: Nothing for today. Enjoy the calm.

importWizard.title: Transfer from another app
importWizard.desc: Transfer tasks, structure, and optional files once. You will see a preview first; Watson changes nothing until you explicitly confirm the import.
importWizard.privateNote: The CSV stays in this window only
importWizard.noProjects: You have no project you can import into
importWizard.chooseCsvHint: Up to 2,000 rows and 10 MB. CSV exports from Asana, Trello, Todoist, and custom tables are supported.
importWizard.supportingFilesHint: If the CSV references attachments, choose them here. Watson matches an exact name or path and never assigns one file twice.
importWizard.allowMissing: Continue knowingly without {{count}} missing files. Tasks will transfer without them.
importWizard.atomicNote: Tasks are written to “{{project}}” atomically. You can roll the import back later if no new work has been added to the transferred tasks.
importWizard.partialTitle: Tasks transferred; some files are waiting
importWizard.successDesc: Transferred {{count}} tasks and {{uploaded}} of {{expected}} expected files.
importWizard.fileFailed: The file {{name}} could not be transferred safely.
importWizard.fileInvalid: The file {{name}} is empty or larger than 20 MB.
importWizard.historyEmpty: No transfer has run in this project yet.
importWizard.historyRolledBack: Rolled back {{date}} · originally {{count}} tasks and {{files}} files
importWizard.rollbackConfirm: This removes only unchanged imported tasks. Type “{{name}}” exactly to confirm.

issue.too_many: the row contains too many values
issue.defaulted: value was not recognized; a safe default will be used
issue.unmatched_assignee: assignee was not found in the target project and will not be assigned
issue.ambiguous_assignee: the name matches more than one person; use an e-mail
issue.parent_missing: parent task is missing from the file
issue.parent_self: a task cannot be its own parent
issue.ambiguous_parent: the parent name matches multiple tasks; use its original ID
issue.max_depth_3: Watson supports at most three levels in this transfer
issue.assignee_not_member: assignee is not in the target project

errors.generic: The transfer could not finish. Data stayed unchanged; try again.
errors.members: Target project members could not be loaded.
errors.history: Transfer history could not be loaded.
errors.attachments: Some files could not be transferred. Tasks are safe and you can retry the files.
errors.csv_too_large: The CSV is larger than 10 MB.
errors.csv_unclosed_quote: The CSV contains an unclosed quote.
errors.csv_cell_too_long: One CSV cell is too long.
errors.csv_too_many_columns: The CSV has more than 100 columns.
errors.csv_too_many_values: A row contains more values than the CSV header.
errors.csv_too_many_rows: The CSV has more than 2,000 data rows. Split it into smaller parts.
errors.import_forbidden: You do not have permission to import into this project.
errors.import_project_not_found: The target project is no longer available.
errors.import_validation_failed: The server found errors in the data. Fix the mapping and run the check again.
errors.import_id_conflict: This import attempt already exists with different content. Start a new transfer.
errors.source_already_imported: This file has already been transferred into the project. Check the history first.
errors.import_rollback_conflict: The import cannot be rolled back because new work was added to an imported task.
errors.stale_import: The import history changed. Reload it and retry the action.
errors.import_rollback_forbidden: Only the importer or a project manager can roll back this import.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account, team, and connections in one place. Every section has its own link.
settings.sectionProfileDesc: Account, availability, working hours, and Focus Time.
settings.sectionDataDesc: Sync, import, export, and safe restore.
settings.sectionIntegrationsDesc: Connected inboxes, identities, and provider administration.
settings.sectionNotificationsDesc: When and how Watson alerts you.
settings.sectionAppearanceDesc: Theme, density, language, and default screen.
settings.teamPersonalEmpty: Team settings appear after switching to a team workspace.
settings.signOutWipeHint: Removes the local database and drafts from this device. For shared or borrowed devices.
settings.signOutWipeConfirm: Sign out and remove all local data from this device? Synced data stays on the server; unsynced changes will be lost.
settings.darkModeDesc: Switches the whole interface to dark.
settings.densityDesc: Airy ↔ compact row and card spacing.
settings.taskConflictPolicyDesc: Controls completion of dependency-blocked tasks and scheduling during unavailability. Focus Time always requires a justified emergency override.
settings.taskConflictPolicyAdminOnly: Only a workspace manager can change this policy.
settings.teamNote: Permissions apply to this space — click a role to change it. Click a member to open their card with workload and tasks.
settings.morningSummaryDesc: Every morning at 8:00 a day overview.
settings.landingDesc: Where Watson takes you when the app opens.
settings.inviteNoUser: No user with this e-mail exists yet.
settings.inviteNote: We'll send an invitation to the given e-mail.
settings.twoFactorDesc: Protects the account with a second code from an authenticator app. Production admins and owners must enable it before making changes.
settings.twoFactorEnabledDesc: The account requires an authenticator code at sign-in.
settings.twoFactorPasswordOptional: Current password (if this account uses one)
settings.twoFactorScanReady: Setup is ready. Confirm it with a code.
settings.twoFactorStartError: 2FA setup failed. For a password account, check the current password.
settings.twoFactorStepApp: 1. Add Watson to an authenticator app
settings.twoFactorStepAppDesc: Copy the full otpauth link into 1Password, Bitwarden, Google Authenticator, or another TOTP app.
settings.twoFactorRecoveryDesc: Each code works once. They will not be shown again after setup.
settings.twoFactorRecoverySaved: I stored the codes away from this device
settings.twoFactorVerifyError: The code is invalid or expired. Try the current code.
settings.twoFactorRotateDesc: Generate a new set if codes were lost or used. All previous codes are invalidated immediately.
settings.twoFactorRotateReady: New recovery codes are ready. Store them away from this device.
settings.twoFactorRotateError: New codes could not be created. For a password account, check the current password.
settings.twoFactorRotateInvalidated: The previous set no longer works. These codes will not be shown again after closing.
settings.backupDownloadDesc: Exports authoritative data from workspaces you own or administer, including history and a signed manifest. Meeting content is included only where you are the creator or a participant; files in external storage and authentication secrets are excluded.
settings.backupDownloadError: The server export could not be created.
settings.backupPassphraseDesc: At least 12 characters. The export is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before download; it cannot be restored without this passphrase and Watson never sends it anywhere.
settings.restoreDesc: A dry run is mandatory: the server verifies the HMAC, checksum, schema version, permissions, duplicates, and every database relationship inside a transaction that is rolled back. Restore never overwrites an existing ID.
settings.restoreChoose: Choose a JSON export to restore
settings.restoreFileReady: File loaded. Run the check before restoring.
settings.restoreDryRunPassed: The check passed; the database was left unchanged.
settings.restoreDryRunResult: Dry run: {{insert}} rows would be restored and {{skip}} existing rows safely skipped.
settings.restoreApplyResult: Restore: inserted {{insert}} rows and skipped {{skip}} rows that already existed.
settings.restoreApplyConfirm: The dry run passed. Restore {{count}} missing rows? Existing data will not be overwritten.

common.aiVendorConsentConfirm: This action sends the entered text and necessary workspace context to an external AI provider. Watson redacts the content before sending, records the transfer in the audit log, and applies your workspace policy. Continue?
common.offlineDataHint: You are offline — numbers reflect the last sync, not the present.

watson.title: Watson
watson.insightOverdue: You have {{count}} overdue tasks — move them to today?
watson.insightPlan: Plan your day — review upcoming tasks.

cheat.title: Keyboard shortcuts
cheat.deleteFailed: Delete failed. Your data was not changed; check your connection and permissions.

palette.placeholder: Find a task, project, meeting, person, or command…

inbox.heading: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Quick ideas and unsorted tasks land here. Assign a project and date — the task then flies on to Today or Upcoming.
inbox.emptyHint: Everything is sorted. Add new ideas with the + Task button.

search.placeholder: Search tasks, comments, meetings, lists, mail…
search.prompt: Start typing — Watson searches authorized data across all your workspaces.
search.operatorHint: Narrow it down: type:task · in:Sales · status:open · before:2026-08-01 · from:jane@company.com · phrases in quotes
search.partialError: Some people could not be loaded. Other results are complete and remain available.
search.emptyHint: Try a different term or check for typos.

goals.empty: No goals in this workspace yet.
goals.helpCompletion: Share of completed tasks in the goal's scope.
goals.helpOntime: Share of tasks completed by their due date.
goals.helpCount: Number of completed tasks against the target count.
goals.helpProject: Completion percentage of the linked project.
goals.namePlaceholder: Goal name — e.g. Launch the new web by Q3
goals.paceTrack: On pace — progress keeps up with time.
goals.paceRisk: Falling behind — {{pct}} % done but {{elapsed}} % of time elapsed.
goals.periodicHint: — the goal renews itself after the period ends
goals.createdInWs: The goal will be created in the active workspace
goals.renewsSub: After the period ends, the value resets and the goal keeps running.
goals.periodResetDone: Goal reset for the next period

metrics.freshPending: Freshness has not been confirmed yet
metrics.mailDemoFreshness: Local demo snapshot · no provider sync

reports.heading: Reports
reports.excludeWeek: Meetings and tasks outside projects in the active workspace
reports.excludeOverdue: Meetings, unscheduled tasks, and tasks outside the active workspace
reports.formulaWeek: Tasks with a completion timestamp in the current Mon–Sun week.
reports.formulaOverdue: Open tasks due before today's local date.
reports.formulaAvg: Monday–Friday completions divided by a fixed five, including an in-progress week.
reports.peopleHint: {{count}} people · click a card for detail and load
reports.peopleHint_one: {{count}} person · click a card for detail and load
reports.peopleHint_few: {{count}} people · click a card for detail and load
reports.peopleHint_many: {{count}} people · click a card for detail and load
reports.peopleHint_other: {{count}} people · click a card for detail and load
reports.emptyProjects: No completed tasks in projects yet

flows.heading: Flows
flows.subtitle: Chains of linked tasks — who is up now and where it is stuck.
flows.empty: No flows in this workspace yet.
flows.openTaskDetail: Open task — edit priority, due date, labels, subtasks…
flows.namePlaceholder: Flow name — e.g. Poster for the June show
flows.hintStart: The first step starts on this day.
flows.hintDeadline: The last step lands on this day; the rest are computed backwards.
flows.footer: {{count}} steps · the relay starts from step 1
flows.chainTitle: Dates are computed from the previous step — delays cascade
flows.anchorTitle: Fixed dates to the anchor — delays do not cascade
flows.shiftEarlier: Shift the whole chain a day earlier
flows.shiftLater: Shift the whole chain a day later
flows.chainHint: When a step is delayed, the following ones move automatically.
flows.anchorHint: Dates are fixed. Delays do not cascade — Watson flags an endangered finish.
flows.remindTitle: Remind me when it's my turn
flows.roleTitle: Assign a role — a person is filled in at creation
flows.waitingManual: The next step has a manual gate — activate it in Flows.
flows.manualActivationError: The manual step could not be started ({{code}}). Check previous steps and your connection.

mail.demoBanner: local simulation — messages never leave Watson
mail.taskCreatedToast: Task from mail added to Inbox — due today
mail.taskNoInbox: No inbox project found — task not created

velin.navTitle: Leadership overview — visible to Owner and Admin only
velin.lockedTitle: The control room is for leadership only
velin.lockedBody: The signed-in account ({{name}}) has the Member role. Owner and Admin roles have access — set it in Reports → People, or in Settings.
velin.excludeTasks: Meetings, personal workspaces, and project inboxes
velin.excludeGoals: Personal goals and goals outside the selected company
velin.scopeMailDemo: Team mail in the local simulation · company filter does not apply
velin.excludeUnread: Personal, closed, archived, deleted, spam, snoozed, and muted threads
velin.excludeUrgent: Personal, closed, archived, deleted, spam, snoozed, and muted threads
velin.formulaOpen: Incomplete tasks in the selected scope.
velin.formulaOverdue: Open tasks due before today's local date.
velin.formulaUnread: Unread team threads according to each mailbox read mode.
velin.formulaUrgent: Active inbox threads marked P1 or P2.
velin.formulaRisk: Team goals whose status is at risk or overdue.

notif.foot: Click an item to handle it right here — task detail and mail open in place.
notif.mention: {{who}} mentioned you in the internal discussion

peek.goalRisk: This goal is at risk — completion pace is behind elapsed time.
peek.replyPh: Write a reply… saved to Drafts as you type.
peek.draftNote: Draft is saved as you type.
peek.warnTitle: You mention an attachment — but none is attached.
peek.chatPh: Message the team… (never leaves the org)
peek.chatEmpty: No internal messages yet — the team coordinates here.

lists.intro: Recurring event checklists — championships, shows, recruiting, camps. Template → instance per event, tick things off, reset after the event.
lists.emptyActive: No active list — create a new one, or start from a template below.
lists.doneSortTitle: Sort completed items to the end of each section (display only — stored order is unchanged). Off = they stay in place.

prehled.synCalm: All calm today — no fires. A good day for deep work.
prehled.synRisk: Goal “{{name}}” is falling behind — {{label}}, {{elapsed}} % of time elapsed.
prehled.synMailOne: An urgent thread awaits in mail: {{names}}.
prehled.waitingEmptyOnMe: Nobody is waiting for your work right now.
prehled.waitingEmptyForOthers: None of your work is currently blocked by others.
prehled.emptyFeed: Quiet so far — no tasks finished today.

qsched.recurringBlocked: Recurring task — this would shift the whole series. Edit recurrence in the detail.

bulk.selTitle: Select for bulk actions · shift-click = range
bulk.recurringSkipped_one: 1 recurring task skipped — edit the series in its detail
bulk.recurringSkipped_other: {{count}} recurring tasks skipped — edit the series in their detail
bulk.assignSkippedShared_one: 1 “each separately” task skipped — bulk assign would erase per-person progress
bulk.assignSkippedShared_other: {{count}} “each separately” tasks skipped — bulk assign would erase per-person progress
bulk.assignNone: Selected tasks share no common project member
bulk.previewWhySkipped: Why some items will be skipped
bulk.previewSkipWorkflow: {{count}} must be completed through its workflow or meeting
bulk.previewLoadFailed: The change preview couldn't be prepared. Nothing changed.
bulk.previewApplyFailed: The bulk change failed. Nothing changed.
bulk.previewUndoFailed: This batch can no longer be safely undone because it changed in the meantime.

previewWarning.blocked_tasks_will_complete: Some tasks are still waiting on blocking work. Confirming explicitly accepts this warning.
previewWarning.assignee_availability_warning: The selected assignee has planned unavailability on some tasks. The workspace uses warning mode, so the change can still be confirmed.

previewConflict.assignee_not_in_project: The selected person isn't a project member for {{count}} tasks.
previewConflict.assignee_availability_conflict: The assignee's Focus Time or strict unavailability blocks assignment on {{count}} tasks. Open them individually and explain any emergency exception.
previewConflict.recurring_scope_required: A recurring series needs an explicit scope: this occurrence, future occurrences, or the whole series ({{count}} items).
previewConflict.external_dependencies_block_move: Dependencies to tasks outside the moved tree block this move.
previewConflict.workflow_steps_block_move: Tasks in a running workflow or meeting block this move.
previewConflict.custom_fields_block_move: Moving would discard project custom fields on {{count}} tasks. Clear the values first or keep the tasks in this project.
previewConflict.workflow_items_block_delete: Workflow and meeting tasks must be deleted individually in their context.
previewConflict.assignees_missing_in_target_project: Some assignees aren't members of the target project ({{count}} tasks).

addmodal.captureSubtitle: One sentence is enough. Watson splits it into fields before saving.
addmodal.capturePlaceholder: What needs to be done? Add tomorrow, p1, #project, or @name…
addmodal.previewMissingName: The task still needs its own name
addmodal.previewNoAttributes: For now, only the name and default fields will be saved. Add a date, priority, project, or person directly in the sentence.
addmodal.titlePlaceholder: Task name — e.g. report tomorrow at 14:00 every Wednesday #Sales @Tom p1
addmodal.invalidLocalTime: This time does not exist in your configured time zone because of daylight saving time.
addmodal.assignHintNone: Unassigned — you can leave it without people.
addmodal.assignHintAll: Each of {{n}} people has their own check-off.
addmodal.assignHintAny: It's enough if any of {{n}} completes it.
addmodal.deadlineBad: Deadline must be on or after the scheduled date ({{term}}).
addmodal.repeatHint: Checking it off moves the task to the next occurrence; it closes when the end is reached.
addmodal.flowHint: Added as the next step of the chain — waits until it's its turn.
addmodal.needsName: The task needs a name — write what should be done. Date and repeat stay set.
addmodal.hint: In the name write #project · p1–p4 · 14:00 · 3. 7. 2027 · !5. 7. (deadline) · @name — it sorts itself into fields.
addmodal.attachHint: Up to 10 files, 20 MB each. Watson uploads them safely when the task is created.
addmodal.attachTooLarge: Empty files and files over 20 MB were skipped.
addmodal.attachOffline: Attachments require a connection. You can save the task offline without them.
addmodal.attachUploadFailed: Attachments could not be uploaded safely. The task has not been created yet.
addmodal.attachFinishing: The task is saved. Attachments will finish after sync.
addmodal.saveFailed: The task could not be saved. Your draft remains in the form.
addmodal.partialSave: The task is saved; some related changes are waiting for sync recovery.

auth.name: Name
auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.body: This screen failed to render. Please try reloading.

board.dropForeignColumn: This column isn't in the task's project.

zasobnik.intro: Tasks without a date. Give them a date, or leave them for later.
zasobnik.empty: The backlog is empty — every task has a date.

booking.heading: Internal booking
booking.intro: Choose an offered time. Nothing is added to the regular calendar until you confirm the booking.
booking.title: Meeting name
booking.participantsHint: They will join every slot. The employee booking the slot is added automatically.
booking.empty: There are no open internal bookings yet.
booking.emptyHint: Managers can offer specific times for one-to-one or multi-person meetings.
booking.reserved: The slot is booked and a meet was added to every attendee's calendar.
booking.cancelled: The booking was cancelled and the time is available again.
booking.confirmBook: Book this time? Confirming creates a meet in every attendee's calendar.
booking.confirmCancel: Cancel this booking? The time will become available to others again.
booking.confirmArchive: Close this offer? Existing bookings remain valid.
booking.fill: Add a name, project, required attendees, and at least one time.
booking.takenError: Someone else booked this time in the meantime.
booking.conflictError: The time conflicts with an attendee's calendar or Focus Time.
booking.staleError: The offer changed in the meantime. Current data has been loaded.
booking.actionError: Could not complete the action. Current data remains safe.
booking.manageOnly: Workspace managers and project managers can create new offers.

intake.heading: Work intake
intake.intro: Simple internal forms turn a structured request directly into a traceable task. This is separate from task approval.
intake.questionsHint: Task name and details are included in every form.
intake.fillRequired: Add a name and target project.
intake.selectNeedsOptions: A select question needs at least two distinct options.
intake.stale: The form changed in the meantime. Reopen it.
intake.titleConflict: A form with the same name already exists in this project.
intake.archived: The form has history and was safely deactivated.
intake.submitted: The request was submitted as a task.
intake.submitError: Could not submit the request. Your draft is still here.
intake.inactiveError: This form was deactivated in the meantime.
intake.submittedBody: A new task now contains the answers and a link to its source form.
intake.linkCopied: The internal form link is on your clipboard.
intake.emptyHint: A project manager can create the first structured work entry point.
intake.submissionsHint: You see your own requests and, as a manager, inputs for managed projects.
intake.noSubmissions: No request has been submitted yet.
